meaning: vt.加强,增援,补充,增加...的数量,修补,加固vi.求援,得到增援n.加固物
examples: I hope this will reinforce Indonesian determination to deal with this kind of threat.
Remember you want your visuals to reinforce your message, not detract from what you are saying.
We agreed on a form of splint to reinforce the damaged portion.
The close involvement of the West in the military campaign could reinforce this resentment, he adds.
